parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Status, Engagement_Status__c, Human_Override__c, IsConverted, LastModifiedDate FROM Lead WHERE Engagement_Status__c = 'Stalled' ORDER BY LastModifiedDate ASC LIMIT 100" }}

={{ "SELECT Id, Stalled_Sequence_Key__c, Stalled_Sequence_Status__c, Stalled_Sequence_Step__c, Stalled_Last_Sequence_Step_Sent__c, Stalled_Last_Sequence_Email_Sent_At__c, Stalled_Next_Follow_Up_Date__c, Stalled_Start_At__c FROM Engagement_Status_Tracker__c WHERE Stalled_Sequence_Key__c = '" + $json.Id + "_Stalled' LIMIT 1" }}
